title: cyrtandra degenerans
intro: Cyrtandra degenerans, also known as the 'Degenerate Cyrtandra' or 'Degenerate Island Cyrtandra', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to Hawaii, where it is found growing in shaded, humid forests. The leaves of Cyrtandra degenerans have been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyrtandra degenerans can be made into a tea, poultice, or infused in oil to utilize its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
